soc2.framework: SOC 2 Type II — AICPA Trust Services Criteria 2017

categories.name: Control Environment
categories.description: COSO principle: entity demonstrates commitment to integrity and ethical values, oversight, structure and authority, competence, and accountability

categories.name: Communication & Information
categories.description: Entity obtains or generates relevant, quality information to support internal control; internally communicates information; communicates with external parties

categories.name: Risk Assessment
categories.description: Entity specifies objectives, identifies and analyzes risks, assesses fraud risk, and identifies changes that could significantly affect internal control

categories.name: Monitoring Activities
categories.description: Entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and separate evaluations; evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies

categories.name: Control Activities
categories.description: Entity selects and develops control activities; selects and develops general controls over technology; deploys controls through policies and procedures

categories.name: Logical & Physical Access Controls
categories.description: Logical access security software, infrastructure and architectures; registration and authorization of new users; access credentials; access removal; physical access; encryption; transmission

categories.name: System Operations
categories.description: Detection and monitoring of new vulnerabilities, anomalies; evaluation of security events; containment; remediation of identified deficiencies

categories.name: Change Management
categories.description: Infrastructure, data, software and procedures changes managed with authorization, design, development, configuration, testing, migration and documentation controls

categories.name: Risk Mitigation
categories.description: Entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities including risk transfer (insurance, contracts); business disruption and vendor/business partner risk management

categories.name: Availability
categories.description: System is available for operation and use as committed or agreed; current processing capacity; environmental, software and data backup and recovery

categories.name: Confidentiality
categories.description: Information designated as confidential is protected as committed; identification and maintenance of confidential information; disposal of confidential information

categories.name: Processing Integrity
categories.description: System processing is complete, valid, accurate, timely and authorized; quality assurance; process monitoring; output reconciliation

categories.name: Privacy — Notice & Communication
categories.description: Entity provides notice about the entity's privacy practices; types of personal information collected; purposes and use of collection

categories.name: Privacy — Choice & Consent
categories.description: Entity communicates choices available to data subjects; data subjects given opportunity to consent; implicit/explicit consent obtained

categories.name: Privacy — Collection
categories.description: Personal information collected consistent with entity's objectives; collection by fair and lawful means; collection for explicit and specified purposes

categories.name: Privacy — Use, Retention & Disposal
categories.description: Personal information used, retained and disposed of consistently with entity's commitments; retention limits; timely disposal of personal information

categories.name: Privacy — Access
categories.description: Entity enables data subjects to access their personal information; processes for requests, completeness, accuracy and currency of information

categories.name: Privacy — Disclosure & Notification
categories.description: Personal information disclosed to third parties only with consent or legal authority; breach notification to affected individuals and regulators

categories.name: Privacy — Quality
categories.description: Personal information accurate, complete and relevant for the purposes for which it is to be used

categories.name: Privacy — Monitoring & Enforcement
categories.description: Entity monitors compliance with its privacy commitments; addresses privacy-related inquiries, complaints and disputes; periodic assessments
